word: G23 - ἀγανακτέω - aganaktéō - ag-an-ak-teh'-o - Be much displeased

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be much displeased
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to be indignant, moved with indignation

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From ἄγαν agan (much) and ἄχθος achhos̄ (grief; akin to the base of G43); to be greatly afflicted, that is, (figuratively) indignant: - be much (sore) displeased, have (be moved with, with) indignation.
